questions.text: Finish the trace above: how many comparisons in total does searching for 2 make before the algorithm reports it is not in the tree?
questions.explanation: 2 vs 5: smaller, go left (1). 2 vs 3: smaller, go left (2). 2 vs 1: bigger, go right (3), but 1 has no right child, so the search stops after 3 comparisons having never found 2.
